task: I need to send a message to someone about a group project, but the situation is a little messy and I want to keep it clear. Can you help me word it so it gets the point across without creating extra back-and-forth?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — I can help with that.

If you want it clear and low-drama, the best approach is:
- state the issue briefly
- say what you need
- avoid over-explaining

You could send something like:

**“Hey, just wanted to clear up the group project situation so there’s no confusion. [briefly explain the issue]. I’m handling my part, but I wanted to make sure everyone’s on the same page.”**

If you want, I can also help you turn it into:
- a more casual text
- a more direct version
- a version for a teacher/counselor
- a version that sounds short and natural and doesn’t invite extra questions

user_simulator.text: Yeah, but that’s still kinda generic. I need the actual message, not the template. Make it short and firm, like it shuts the door on extra back-and-forth without sounding dramatic.

turns.agent_response:
Yep — send this:

**“Hey, just to be clear, I’m handling my part of the group project, and I’m not getting into a back-and-forth about it. I wanted to make sure that’s understood.”**

If you want, I can make it:
- a little softer
- more casual
- more firm
- or tailored to the exact messy situation

user_simulator.text:
Close, but still a little too clean. I want it sharper and less “I’m being polite.” Like: **“Just so it’s clear, I’m doing my part on the project and I’m not arguing about it. That’s all I needed to say.”**

That feels more final. If you can make it even shorter, better.

turns.agent_response:
Yep — here are a few shorter, firmer versions:

**“Just so it’s clear, I’m doing my part on the project. I’m not arguing about it.”**

Even shorter:

**“I’m doing my part. I’m not arguing about it.”**

If you want it a little sharper but still normal:

**“I’m handling my part of the project. That’s all I needed to say.”**

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. The short one works: **“I’m doing my part. I’m not arguing about it.”**

That’s clean enough.
